Class CumulativeZipCode

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.cumulative.CumulativeZipCode
public class CumulativeZipCode extends DashboardDataItemLogic
This class is used for generating the data item cumulative.zipcode.
